implemented_contracts: PostgreSQL saved_views table with workspace namespace, state payload, current_version and reversible migration
PostgreSQL saved_view_versions immutable version chain with create/update/restore action_type
Saved-view X-EEI-User-Namespace and X-EEI-Actor header contract with local_user default for MVP local mode
Repository get/update/version-list/restore lookups constrained by saved_views.namespace so cross-namespace access fails closed as 404
Same saved-view name can exist in different namespaces while duplicate names conflict inside one namespace/workspace
Optimistic expected_version conflict response through HTTP 409 and saved-view-conflict-v1 detail
Recovery by restoring a historical version into a new current version
operation_logs success/conflict audit rows for create/update/restore

checks: create same saved-view name in tenant-beta namespace with a distinct id and audit actor
reject stale update with expected_version 1 after current_version 2
restore target_version 1 from expected_version 2 into current_version 3
reject stale restore after current_version advances to 3
assert operation_logs records three success and three conflict rows for the local_user saved-view chain

remaining_to_close_a207: Frontend API-first adapter is covered by artifacts/tests/a207/t1305_frontend_saved_view_api_adapter_contract.json
Live multisession E2E harness, conflict recovery UI and CI PASS evidence are covered by artifacts/tests/a207/t1305_live_saved_view_multisession_e2e_contract.json
Bind X-EEI-User-Namespace and X-EEI-Actor to a trusted production identity provider or gateway before public multi-user deployment
